rationale: The only resume change was renaming three employers (re:cinq→Acme, Optilyz→Pinepoint, GISCollective→Northwind Labs), all still in Berlin and all carrying no job-relevant signal. Both evaluations awarded an identical 9/10 with the same headline justification and overlapping strengths. The variant's differing concerns — short tenures and DLang focus — key off the resume's dates and past-language usage, not the employer names, and read as ordinary run-to-run variation in how concerns are surfaced rather than a penalty tied to the renamed companies. No score movement and no reasoning that disparages the generic/renamed employers relative to the originals.
